# CWE-434 negative: upload allowlist and random stored name (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-434-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
)

func HandleAvatarUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseMultipartForm(8 << 20)
	file, hdr, err := r.FormFile("avatar")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	defer file.Close()
	ext := strings.ToLower(filepath.Ext(hdr.Filename))
	if ext != ".png" && ext != ".jpg" {
		http.Error(w, "unsupported file type", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var nonce [16]byte
	_, _ = rand.Read(nonce[:])
	dest := filepath.Join("/var/www/static/avatars", hex.EncodeToString(nonce[:])+ext)
	out, err := os.Create(dest)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "upload failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	_, _ = io.Copy(out, file)
	_ = out.Close()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
